title: Team-start: Galactic Dancing Constellation (7efeec) — post-compaction resumption, EEFFF PR-1 delivery focus
body:
Team-start report — Galactic Dancing Constellation (7efeec), post-compaction resumption.

This is a post-compaction resumption of the EEF First Feature session, not a fresh team. Same identity continues (same session_id_prefix 7efeec, same agent_id 5b9f4a49-e58c-59e3-810c-411823aafa66). Pre-compaction handoff record at `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-26-galactic-pre-compaction.md` carries full continuity.

IDENTITY + STATUS

- Identity: Galactic Dancing Constellation / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 7efeec / id 5b9f4a49-e58c-59e3-810c-411823aafa66
- Foundation: complete (AGENT.md, principles, schema-first, orientation, repo-continuity, eef thread, both pre-compaction handoff records all read)
- Heartbeat cron status: started 62b08131 (4-min cadence; owner-input precedence honoured per liveness-heartbeat-cron rule)
- Watcher status: started Monitor bmofc1m0i (persistent, full all-channels, self-exclude on (Galactic, claude, 7efeec))
- Inherited working-tree status: clean of source. Lifecycle residue only — active-claims.json, closed-claims.archive.json, shared-comms-log.md, 4 untracked comms events from pre-compaction final broadcasts (`6e66b0cb`, `98326ee7`, `ae462bb8`, `dc291fe0`), plus `.cursor/mcp.json` (inherited drift, not mine).
- Branch state: `feat/graph-foundations` HEAD = `cdff0fef` (absorption) + `c0942d48` (cure) ahead of main; both pre-compaction commits durably landed.
- Active claims at session-open: none. All four claims opened pre-compaction (`68cfc22f`, `47ccbc4e`, `3b31e68c`, `42182b7f`) closed cleanly.

SESSION INTENT (per /oak-start-right-team args this turn)

"Collaborate with Starless to create a linear, complete implementation plan for the EEFFF for this session."

This is the post-compaction first action the owner stated at 20:08Z pre-compaction: "create a detailed, linear, simple implementation task list" for the remaining EEF First Feature work. The current invocation reframes it as the session's deliverable rather than a precursor.

INTENDED BOUNDARY

Plan-artefact authorship. No source-claim required at this stage. The plan is a markdown artefact (likely under `.agent/plans/sector-engagement/eef/current/`) that future implementer cycles execute against.

USEFUL CAPABILITY

Continuity-of-context from the pre-compaction session (same window). LTAE-grounded branch sequence verdict already drafted by Starless in their handoff record awaiting owner confirmation. Both pre-compaction handoff records carry all inputs the plan needs: 4-PR delivery sequence (`please-do-a-deep-mighty-peach.plan.md`), EEF first-feature plan body, corpus plan, lane assignments.

CONSTRAINT OR RISK

1. **Starless's post-compaction resumption not yet observed.** Owner directive is "Collaborate with Starless" — I will wait briefly for a Starless team-start broadcast before authoring solo. If Starless does not surface within ~10 minutes, I proceed solo per the singleton-lane silent-default after reasonable time (the deliverable cannot wait indefinitely for an unstarted peer session), and Starless picks up reviewer / Lane A roles when they arrive.
2. **Reviewer-on-standby commitment outstanding.** Starless's pre-compaction handoff names the review-dispatch invitation event `ae462bb8` (post-execution code-expert + type-expert on absorption commit `cdff0fef`) as a continuity obligation. Post-compaction-Starless honours it on arrival.

LTAE BRANCH-SEQUENCE VERDICT (continued from pre-compaction)

Starless's `bbde197e` carries the LTAE verdict: cure-PR `feat/graph-foundations` → `main` first; branch `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs-take2` from clean main; PR-1 lanes on take2. Owner has not confirmed. This will be the **first task-list item** in the linear plan I author — surfaced as the verdict for owner ratification, not as a multiple-choice question.

PREFERRED BOUNDARY

- This session: linear-plan authorship.
- Subsequent sessions: Lane B implementer (freshness script + plan-promotion doc) per the pre-compaction lane split.

— Galactic Dancing Constellation (7efeec)
